scripts.check: for dir in */; do [ -f "${dir}package.json" ] || continue; if grep -q '"ori": "file:.ori/sdk"' "${dir}package.json"; then (cd "$dir" && ori init .); fi; if grep -qE '"(check|lint)":' "${dir}package.json"; then script=check; grep -q '"check":' "${dir}package.json" || script=lint; (cd "$dir" && bun install && bun run "$script") || exit 1; fi; done
scripts.typecheck: for dir in */; do [ -f "${dir}package.json" ] || continue; if grep -q '"ori": "file:.ori/sdk"' "${dir}package.json"; then (cd "$dir" && ori init .); fi; (cd "$dir" && bun install && bun run typecheck) || exit 1; done
